Documentation.long_help: Merge multiple disconnected regions of a surface mesh by fusing nearby vertices across different regions. For each vertex in one region, finds the closest vertex in each other region; if within the threshold, they are fused. Vertices within the same connected region are never merged.
Documentation.short_help: Merge disconnected mesh regions by fusing nearby vertices across regions.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FuseThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Fuse Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Distance threshold for vertex fusion. Vertices from different connected regions that are within this distance will be merged. Vertices farther apart are ignored.
